wiring_layers.classification: actively wired into Strategy Chat and generation
wiring_layers.evidence: Darren operating style is extracted in darren-intelligence-snapshot-core.js and included in generation/chat context.
Profile, assessment, and company counts feed snapshot/compact context; payment and revenue evidence remain mostly missing.
9-path backbone, path coverage, path comparison, and scenario lens feed chat/generation context.
Proof targets, evidence gaps, One Move status, ledger events, and since-last comparison are active.
Truth boundaries, unavailable fields, model limits, and anti-overclaim prompts are strong.
Outcome Ledger exists and feeds routes, but proof depth and verified outcomes are thin.
One Move status and confirmed chat action flows exist; no full strategy adopt/reject lifecycle yet.
darren-since-last-snapshot.js compares latest strategy and ledger events.
darren-generated-strategy-core.js persists and loads structured ledger events.
Movement bands and assessment artifacts exist, but do not update active futures.

wiring_layers.classification: displayed boundary or mostly not present
wiring_layers.evidence: Darren context marks payment/subscription/revenue evidence as missing or not indexed.
Counts and indexes feed snapshot; full rows remain admin evidence.
Compact build-map truth feeds chat; full roadmap detail is mostly admin/display.

panel_audit.captures_evidence: proposed actions only; writes require confirmation

panel_audit.panel: Current Strategy / Five Futures / One Move

panel_audit.treatment: keep collapsed until review workflow exists
keep collapsed and merge duplicates later

panel_audit.feeds_chat_context: compact truth yes; full cards no

wiring_gaps: No governed review/adopt flow promotes adaptive drafts into active strategy versions.
No usage telemetry tracks which panels, chat answers, or recommendations produce value.
Payment, subscription, and revenue evidence are not yet indexed as mature Financial Reality inputs.
Future movement remains evidence-band scaffolding and does not update active futures.
Initial Five Futures generation does not fully use post-generation ledger/session/adaptive history as first-class recursive inputs.
Raw profile and assessment rows are admin evidence, not subscriber-safe reasoning context.
Proof targets do not yet have a full lifecycle with owner, due date, status, and ledger linkage.
Architecture is Darren-specific and not yet profile/account/subscription scoped.
top_blockers: Future Movement Gate is not a durable movement engine.
Darren-specific contracts are not generalized to subscriber architecture.

recommended_next_sprints.name: Governed Strategy Review / Adopt Loop
recommended_next_sprints.why: Converts adaptive drafts into a real human-governed learning cycle.

recommended_next_sprints.name: Minimal Value Telemetry
recommended_next_sprints.why: Shows what Darren uses, follows, ignores, and turns into proof.

recommended_next_sprints.name: Financial Proof Indexing
recommended_next_sprints.why: Turns subscription/payment/revenue evidence into real Financial Reality.

recommended_next_sprints.name: Proof Target Lifecycle
recommended_next_sprints.why: Gives proof targets IDs, status, ownership, due dates, and ledger linkage.

recommended_next_sprints.name: Subscriber Architecture Abstraction
recommended_next_sprints.why: Moves Darren-specific architecture toward profile/account/subscription-scoped product contracts.

brutal_summary.is_dashboard_pretending_to_be_intelligen: not entirely; it has real intelligence routes and persistence, but the closed loop is not mature yet
should_not_build_yet: broad employee/team/org people layer inside Darren dashboard
external signal layer before internal evidence governance
raw admin table injection into prompts
